posts.author: gaurav
posts.community: Freshara Agro Exports Ltd - 3rd Largest Gherkins Exporter from India
posts.text: good results for q4fy26 with some caveats. q4 consolidated revenue at all time high of 204 cr and fy26 revenue at 342 cr marking a jump of 34% from fy25. pat is 37 cr vs 28 cr last year (32%). topline growth is slightly better than expected. -ve operating cash flows and margin compression are major concern but not surprising. fy27 is going to be make or break year for the company. need to watchout for working capital and fund raise. They have also shared a future outlook image 979×312 92.4 KB We must not assign this as guidance. Through word play it looks more of an ambition. Important thing i…
